title: Codereview pass 1: WINDOW_SIZE constant shadowing in replay window
description:
In rust/lichen-oscore/src/lib.rs, the is_replay_candidate() function defines a local WINDOW_SIZE const at line 343 that shadows the module-level const at line 61. Additionally, update_replay_window() uses a hardcoded literal 32 at line 377 instead of either constant.

Fix: Remove the local constant in is_replay_candidate() and use the module-level WINDOW_SIZE in both functions. This ensures a single source of truth for the window size.
close_reason: Removed local WINDOW_SIZE shadowing, now uses module-level constant
